data.title: Trader Closes SOL Short Position with Loss
data.description:
On January 21, a trader known for a '100% success rate' closed a short position on 2,000 SOL, incurring a loss of $570. According to BlockBeats, this position was opened 20 days ago, and despite initial significant floating losses due to market recovery, the trader closed the position near the opening price as the market continued to decline.

Currently, the trader's address holds no positions and is observing the market, with a total profit of $138,000 over the entire period.

data.title: SlowMist CISO: Snap Store Suffers New Attack Targeting Crypto Wallets
data.description: SlowMist CISO 23pds published an article on the X platform stating that Linux users should be aware of a new type of attack affecting Snap Store. Hackers are using expired domains to set up backdoors to steal users' crypto assets. The modified application masquerades as well-known crypto wallets such as Exodus, Ledger Live, or Trust Wallet, tricking users into entering their wallet recovery mnemonic phrases, resulting in the theft of funds.

data.title: The US XRP spot ETF saw a net outflow of $53.32 million in a single day.
data.description: According to SoSoValue data, the XRP spot ETF saw a net outflow of $53.32 million yesterday (January 20th, Eastern Time). The Grayscale XRP ETF (GXRP) experienced a single-day net outflow of $55.39 million yesterday (January 20th, Eastern Time), with a historical total net inflow of $232 million. The Franklin XRP ETF (XRPZ) saw a single-day net inflow of $2.07 million, with a historical total net inflow of $290 million. As of press time, the total net asset value of the XRP spot ETF was $1.34 billion, with an XRP net asset ratio of 1.16%, and a historical cumulative net inflow of $1.22 billion.

data.title: The total issuance of TRC20-USDT has exceeded 83.4 billion, setting a new historical record.
data.description: The issuance of TRC20-USDT has reached a record high of 83.4 billion. Since the beginning of this year, the TRON network has issued a cumulative total of 2 billion USDT. As of now, the number of TRC20-USDT holding accounts has reached 70.69 million, with over 3.09 billion transactions. Meanwhile, the total number of accounts on the TRON network recently surpassed 360 million, indicating a continued rise in on-chain activity. Furthermore, independent year-end analysis reports recently released by Messari, RWA.io, and Stablecoin Insider all show that TRON has completed its evolution from a high-throughput payment network to a core settlement layer for global stablecoins and tokenized assets. The Stablecoin Insider report specifically points out that in the past year, the cumulative transaction volume of TRON USDT was approximately $7.9 trillion, making it a core channel for the global digital circulation of the US dollar. TRC20-USDT is a stablecoin pegged to the US dollar issued by Tether on the TRON network. Its fast transfer speed and low transaction fees have attracted a large number of users, and it is supported by many exchanges such as Binance, HTX, OKX, Bitfinex, MEXC, KuCoin, Gate.io, and Poloniex.

data.title: XRP Spot ETF Experiences Significant Net Outflows
data.description: Data from SoSoValue indicates that on January 20, Eastern Time, XRP spot ETFs saw a total net outflow of $53.32 million. According to Odaily, the Grayscale XRP ETF GXRP recorded a single-day net outflow of $55.39 million, with historical total net inflows reaching $232 million. Meanwhile, the Franklin XRP ETF XRPZ experienced a single-day net inflow of $2.07 million, bringing its historical total net inflows to $290 million. As of the time of reporting, the total net asset value of XRP spot ETFs stands at $1.34 billion, with an XRP net asset ratio of 1.16%. The cumulative historical net inflow has reached $1.22 billion.

data.title: White House Announces Continued Focus on Key Initiatives
data.description: The White House has announced its ongoing commitment to several key initiatives. According to ChainCatcher, the official account on platform X stated that efforts related to victory, expulsion actions, and memes will continue to be a focus.

data.title: The US Solana spot ETF saw a net inflow of $3.08 million in a single day.
data.description: According to SoSoValue data, the Solana spot ETF saw a total net inflow of $3.08 million yesterday (January 20th, Eastern Time). The Fidelity SOL ETF (FSOL) saw the largest net inflow yesterday (January 20th, Eastern Time), with a single-day net inflow of $2.25 million and a historical total net inflow of $145 million. This was followed by the Franklin SOL ETF (SOEZ), with a single-day net inflow of $1.09 million and a historical total net inflow of $3.33 million. As of press time, the Solana spot ETF has a total net asset value of $1.07 billion, a net asset value ratio of 1.49%, and a historical cumulative net inflow of $867 million.

data.title: BitMart lists Seeker (SKR)
data.description: According to an official announcement, BitMart will list Seeker (SKR) on January 21st at 11:00 AM (UTC+8), with the SKR/USDT trading pair available. The Solana Mobile platform is growing through a decentralized economy, incentive mechanisms, and ownership of the platform itself—from device access to distribution and management of the dApp store. Seeker remains a benchmark for Web3 mobile devices thanks to its superior mobile cryptocurrency user experience, while Solana Mobile's vision goes further, aiming to ensure a seamless and secure on-chain experience for mobile users worldwide.

data.title: Flying Tulip (FT) pre-auction FDV of $1 billion with principal protection
data.description: IMPOSSIBLE announced on the X platform that it has released details of its early public auction for flyingtulip (FT). The auction's FDV is $1 billion, matching the seed round, with the token price at $0.10. Highlights include 100% unlocking at TGE, 100% principal protection (refundable tokens will be burned to reduce the total supply), no team token allocation, and funds will be deposited into low-risk DeFi protocols to generate yield. The specific timeline (UTC) is as follows: January 21st to 23rd, 10:00 AM: IDIA staker purchase period and reward round; January 27th, 4:00 AM to January 29th, 4:00 PM: public round.

data.title: White House: Victory, deportation actions, and memes will continue.
data.description: The White House official account posted on the X platform that the victory, the expulsion operation, and the memes will continue to appear.

data.title: Binance to Suspend THORChain (RUNE) Network Transactions for Upgrade
data.description:
According to the announcement from Binance, the platform will temporarily suspend deposits and withdrawals of tokens on the THORChain (RUNE) network starting approximately on 2026-01-22 at 20:00 (UTC). This suspension is to facilitate a network upgrade aimed at enhancing user experience. The upgrade is scheduled to occur at block height 24,635,898, which is expected to be reached around 2026-01-22 at 21:00 (UTC).

The trading of tokens on the THORChain network will remain unaffected during this period. Binance assures users that it will manage all technical requirements related to the upgrade. Once the network is confirmed to be stable post-upgrade, deposits and withdrawals will be reopened. No additional announcements will be made regarding the reopening of these services.

data.title: U.S. Treasury Secretary Comments on Global Bond Market Volatility
data.description:
U.S. Treasury Secretary Besent stated on January 21 that the recent market downturn is primarily due to significant fluctuations in the Japanese bond market over the past two days. According to BlockBeats, these fluctuations have been reflected in Japan's ten-year government bonds.

Besent has been in communication with Japan's economic leaders, urging them to take necessary actions to stabilize their bond market. The volatility is spreading across global bond markets, with yields rising in Germany, France, and the United States. Besent emphasized that the issue originates from the Japanese bond market and is unrelated to Greenland.

data.description:
Ethereum price started a fresh decline from the $3,200 resistance. ETH is now consolidating losses and is at risk of more losses below $2,880. Ethereum started a sharp downside correction below $3,000. The price is trading below $3,000 and the 100-hourly Simple Moving Average

data.title: OpenAI Launches Stargate Community Plan to Achieve Energy Self-Sufficiency
data.description: OpenAI announced the launch of the 'Stargate Community Plan' on Tuesday, aiming to achieve energy self-sufficiency and ensure its operations do not increase local community electricity costs. According to Odaily, the Stargate Plan is a multi-year initiative with a budget of $500 billion, focused on building AI data centers for training and inference, supported by major investors including Oracle. As energy acquisition becomes a critical constraint in AI development, several tech companies are investing directly in power infrastructure to support larger and more numerous data centers. OpenAI stated that each Stargate Plan site will feature a customized community plan guided by community feedback and local needs. Specifically, this may involve providing new dedicated power and storage facilities funded entirely by the project, or covering the costs of new energy generation and transmission resources.

data.title: VIX Index Reaches Eight-Week High Amid Geopolitical Concerns
data.description:
The VIX index, a measure of market volatility, surged by 1.9 points to reach 20.69, marking an eight-week high on Tuesday, before closing at 20.09, the highest since November 24. According to ChainCatcher, Jim Carroll, a senior wealth advisor in Charleston, South Carolina, noted that while there is a noticeable reaction in risk indicators, it is not yet a cause for immediate panic.

Alex Morris from F/m Investments highlighted that the market's response to geopolitical tensions involves avoiding stock risks and investing in gold and cash. He added that the VIX would need to rise to 30 to trigger genuine panic.

data.title: OpenAI Announces Data Center Energy Cost Control Plan
data.description: OpenAI announced its "Stargate Community plan" on Tuesday, aiming to achieve energy self-sufficiency and ensure its operations do not increase electricity costs for local communities. The Stargate project, a multi-year, $500 billion initiative to build AI data centers for training and inference, has garnered support from major investors including Oracle. As energy access becomes a key constraint on AI development, many tech companies are directly investing in power infrastructure to support larger and more numerous data centers. OpenAI stated that each Stargate site will have a tailored community plan, "driven by community input and local needs." "Specifically, this could include providing entirely new dedicated power and storage facilities for the project (fully funded by the project team), or increasing and paying for new energy generation and transmission resources." (Jinshi)
